title: Minable budding Amethyst
description: Makes Budding Amethyst minable with Silk Touch.
body:
# Minable Budding Amethyst

Budding Amethyst can now be mined with Silk Touch

Block drops itself instead of nothing

Vanilla Loot Table is overwritten

Works on Fabric

Server-side compatible

No influence without Silk Touch

No new items or blocks added
